input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8134 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.doxia:doxia-site-renderer:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Upstream tests add optional parser modules such as doxia-module-apt, doxia-module-xdoc, and doxia-module-fml for their own format-specific coverage; generated tests should avoid depending on those formats unless they intentionally add matching test dependencies.

Tests copied from the 1.9.1 scaffold will not compile because classes and methods such as RenderingContext, SkinResourceLoader, enableLogging, and setUsingDefaultTemplate changed or disappeared in 2.0.0.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra deterministic setup is required: doxia-site-renderer is an in-process Maven Doxia/Velocity site renderer, and the resolved 2.0.0 artifact already brings the core runtime pieces needed for meaningful tests, including Doxia core/sink/site/skin models, the XHTML5 parser module, Sisu/Plexus integration, Velocity, Velocity tools, and Plexus utilities. The reported failure is caused by API changes from 1.9.1 to 2.0.0, not missing external setup.
